de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort

Class GenericSort

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.AbstractSort
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.GenericSort
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Sort

    public final class GenericSort
extends AbstractSort
    Sort used for generic taclets Within an SVInstantiations-object a generic sort is instantiated by a concrete sort, which has to be a subsort of the instantiations of the supersorts of this sort

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableSet<Sort> oneOf
      list of sorts this generic sort may be instantiated with; EMPTY_SORT_SORT means that every sort may be used

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.Sort

        ANY, CAST_NAME, EXACT_INSTANCE_NAME, FORMULA, INSTANCE_NAME, TERMLABEL, UPDATE

    • Constructor Summary

      GenericSort(Name name) 
      GenericSort(Name name, ImmutableSet<Sort> ext, ImmutableSet<Sort> oneOf)
      creates a generic sort

    • Field Detail

      • oneOf

        private final ImmutableSet<Sort> oneOf
        list of sorts this generic sort may be instantiated with; EMPTY_SORT_SORT means that every sort may be used

    • Constructor Detail

      • GenericSort

        public GenericSort(Name name,
           ImmutableSet<Sort> ext,
           ImmutableSet<Sort> oneOf)
            throws GenericSupersortException
        creates a generic sort
        Parameters:
        ext - supersorts of this sort, which have to be either concrete sorts or plain generic sorts (i.e. not collection sorts of generic sorts)
        Throws:
        GenericSupersortException

      • GenericSort

        public GenericSort(Name name)

    • Method Detail

      • checkSupersorts

        private void checkSupersorts()
                      throws GenericSupersortException
        Throws:
        GenericSupersortException

      • getOneOf

        public ImmutableSet<Sort> getOneOf()
        Returns:
        possible instantiations

      • isPossibleInstantiation

        public boolean isPossibleInstantiation(Sort p_s)
        Returns:
        true if "p_s" is a possible instantiation of this sort. This method does not check the instantiations of other generic sorts, i.e. the return value true is possible even if "p_s" is not a valid instantiation. Use "GenericSortInstantiations" instead

      • checkNonGenericSupersorts

        protected boolean checkNonGenericSupersorts(Sort p_s)
        Returns:
        true iff "p_s" is subsort of every non-generic supersort of this sort
